summary: Iteration 45: Full System Audit - ALL TESTS PASSED (100% backend, 100% frontend). Comprehensive testing of Landing page, Login flow, Admin Panel (16 views), Legal pages, and Responsive design. All 26 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows verified working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all landing, login, admin, legal, responsive tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. System is stable with 47 leads, bookings with calendar view, and all 16 admin sidebar views functional. Monitoring shows all services OK (API, DB, Worker, Email, LLM/DeepSeek, Revolut, Stripe, Webhooks). Contact/Booking APIs use German field names (vorname, nachname, nachricht, unternehmen, telefon, thema).

LANDING_1_Hero.details: Hero section renders with 3D WebGL scene, heading 'Intelligente Agenten. Operative Exzellenz.', CTA buttons (Beratung starten, Leistungen), stat cards (ENTERPRISE, AGENTEN, INTEGRATION, COMPLIANCE)

LANDING_2_Navigation.details: Navigation links present: Leistungen, Use Cases, App-Entwicklung, Integrationen, Tarife, KI-SEO, Services, FAQ. Anchor links working.

LANDING_3_Footer.details: Footer renders with legal links, language selector (DE, NL, EN), WhatsApp button

LOGIN_1_Admin.details: Admin login flow: email → password → redirect to /admin. 2-column layout with branding left, form right.

ADMIN_1_Dashboard.details: Dashboard shows stats cards: LEADS GESAMT, NEUE LEADS, BUCHUNGEN, CHAT-SESSIONS

ADMIN_2_Leads.details: Leads view shows 47 leads with search/filter, status badges (NEU, TERMIN, QUALIFIED), date/time columns

ADMIN_3_Calendar.details: Kalender view shows April 2026 calendar with booking indicators, 'Termin anlegen' and 'Slot blockieren' buttons

ADMIN_4_Customers.details: Kunden view accessible via sidebar navigation

ADMIN_11_Monitoring.details: System Monitoring shows all services OK: API v3.0.0, Datenbank (35 collections), Worker/Queue, E-Mail (Resend), LLM/DeepSeek, Revolut, Stripe, Webhooks (28 events), Memory/Audit, Dead Letter Queue, Object Storage, Dokumente

API_1_Contact.details: POST /api/contact creates lead with German fields (vorname, nachname, nachricht, unternehmen, telefon)

API_2_Booking.details: POST /api/booking creates booking with German fields (vorname, nachname, thema, unternehmen, telefon)

API_3_Chat.details: POST /api/chat/message returns AI response with message, qualification

LEGAL_1_All_Pages.details: All 4 legal pages render: Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB, KI-Hinweise (with proper 1-5 section numbering)

RESPONSIVE_1_Mobile.details: Landing page at 375px: Hero visible, hamburger menu, stacked CTA buttons, language selector

RESPONSIVE_2_Tablet.details: Admin panel responsive at 1024px width (verified via API tests)
